cases.name: unwind integer array and return elements
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN x

cases.name: unwind with distinct removes duplicates
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3, 1, 2] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN DISTINCT x

cases.name: unwind with count aggregation
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x RETURN count(x)

cases.name: unwind with where filter
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS ids UNWIND ids AS x WITH x WHERE x > 1 RETURN x

cases.name: unwind target cannot shadow source name
cases.cypher: WITH [1, 2, 3] AS x UNWIND x AS x RETURN x

cases.name: unwind collected node names and return them
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.tag = 'unwind_test' WITH collect(n.name) AS names UNWIND names AS name RETURN name

cases.name: unwind collected names then match against another kind
cases.cypher: MATCH (n:NodeKind1) WHERE n.tag = 'unwind_xk' WITH collect(n.name) AS names UNWIND names AS name MATCH (m:NodeKind2) WHERE m.name = name RETURN m
